cards.title: Likhadi tsa ho ngola
cards.subtitle: Kopanya 'Tataiso ea ho ngola + Polokelo ea mekhoa + Polokelo ea litaba + Tsoelo-pele + Litlhoko tse eketsehileng', u sebelise ka kotloloho ha u hlaha.
cards.newCard: Etsa khad e ncha ea ho ngola
cards.extraReqPh: Mohlala: Qetellong ea khaolo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e kenye potso eo u ka nahanang ka eona…
cards.empty: Ha u e na likhadi tsa ho ngola, toba holimo ka ho le letona ho etsa e ncha
cards.deleteConfirm: Na u netefatsa ho hlakola? Ketso ena e ke ke ea khutlisoa.

catHint.continuation: E tla hlahisa litaba tse latelang ho latela sengoloa se khethiloeng

cards.sourcePromptPh: Bolella AI mokhoa oa ho sebelisa tokomane ena, mohlala: Etsa mohlala oa tsela eo e hlalosang lintho ka thata
cards.filePathPh: Mohlala D:\docs\style.md (bolela faele ea mantlha, u se ke ua e kopitsa)
cards.noSources: Ha ho mehloli ea tsebo tlas'a sehlopha sena
cards.formats: E tšehetsa txt / md / pdf / docx / epub
cards.selectHint: Tšoaea mehloli ea tsebo eo u batlang ho e kenya sehlopheng sena
cards.viewCard: Lintlha tsa khad ea ho ngola

generate.tags: Lits'oants'o (tšoaea ka #, mohlala #pale #thaba-pelo, u siee AI e li hlahise)

settings.title: Litlhophiso tsa mofuta oa AI
